title: Doc2ArchAgent System YAML Schema
description: Schema for architecture/*/system.yaml — the core C4 architecture model with security-enriched fields for threat modeling, compliance validation, and attack surface analysis.

compliance_frameworks.description: Regulatory frameworks this system must comply with (e.g., PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO27001).

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum extraction confidence (0.0–1.0) for including entities. Default 0.95.

business_criticality.description: Business criticality tier. Drives risk impact scoring and SLA expectations.

data_sensitivity_level.description: System-wide default data sensitivity. Individual data_entities may override.

threat_model_version.description: Version identifier for the threat model (e.g., 1.0, 2024-Q4-review).

last_review_date.description: ISO 8601 date of last security/architecture review.

reviewer.description: Person or team who conducted the last review.

out_of_scope.description: If true, threat rules skip this context.

owner.description: Team or person owning this container. Overrides system-level owner for blast radius contact.

usage.description: Flow purpose. DevOps/monitoring flows receive lower threat severity.

multi_tenant.description: Multi-tenant components require stronger authentication and tenant isolation.

encryption_key_management.description: How encryption keys are managed. HSM/vault indicate stronger key protection.

secrets_manager_ref.description: Reference to an infrastructure_resource ID for secrets management (e.g., hashicorp-vault).

availability.description: Availability requirement. Critical components trigger DoS risk rules.

integrity.description: Integrity requirement. Critical components trigger tampering risk rules.

confidentiality.description: Confidentiality requirement (CIA triad). Critical components require encryption and strong access control.

dfd_element_type.description: Data Flow Diagram element type for STRIDE-per-element applicability. process=all 6, data_store=TRID, external_entity=SR.

stores_data.description: Whether this component persists data. Enables encryption-at-rest and data retention rules.

processes_pii.description: Whether this component processes PII. Triggers GDPR/privacy compliance rules.

audit_logging.description: Whether this component emits audit logs. Required for HIPAA §164.312(b) and PCI-DSS Req 10.

audit_log_destination.description: Reference to a logging infrastructure_resource ID where audit logs are sent.

rto_minutes.description: Recovery Time Objective in minutes. Drives disaster recovery planning.

rpo_minutes.description: Recovery Point Objective in minutes. Drives backup frequency requirements.

slsa_level.description: SLSA supply chain integrity level (0=none, 3=highest). Enables supply chain threat rules.

sbom_available.description: Whether an SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) exists for this component.

tls_version_max.description: Maximum TLS version (e.g., 1.3). Useful to detect forced downgrades.

cipher_suite_policy.description: Cipher suite policy. modern=TLS 1.3 AEAD only, intermediate=TLS 1.2+ PFS, legacy=weak suites (flagged).

forward_secrecy_required.description: Perfect Forward Secrecy via ECDHE. Prevents retrospective decryption if keys compromised.

certificate_type.description: TLS certificate validation level. Self-signed certificates flag as risk in production.

mtls_mode.description: Mutual TLS mode. strict=both sides verify identity (Zero Trust requirement).

tls_termination_point.description: Where TLS terminates. Affects whether internal traffic is encrypted.

rate_limiting_enabled.description: Whether rate limiting is active on this listener. OWASP API #4.

rate_limit_rps.description: Maximum requests per second. Enables DoS risk quantification.

throttle_by.description: Rate limiting dimension. tenant-level throttling prevents noisy neighbor.

exposure.description: Intended exposure scope. More granular than zone-level internet_routable.

api_type.description: API protocol type. GraphQL and SOAP have specific threat surfaces.

admin_interface.description: Administrative endpoint. Higher risk — requires MFA per PCI-DSS Req 8.3.

session_timeout_minutes.description: Session/token timeout in minutes. Long sessions increase session hijacking risk.

error_detail_exposure.description: Error response verbosity. detailed/stack_trace in production is information disclosure.

cors_policy.description: CORS policy strictness. Wildcard CORS on authenticated endpoints is a vulnerability.

component_relationships.description: Relationships between components — data flows for STRIDE analysis.

interaction_type.description: Communication pattern. Async patterns have different threat profiles (replay, ordering).

mutual_authentication.description: Both sides verify identity (mTLS, not just server TLS). Zero Trust requirement.

input_validation.description: Input validation at this boundary. none=injection risk.

replay_protection.description: Whether nonces/timestamps/sequence numbers prevent replay attacks.

data_masking.description: Whether PII/sensitive fields are masked or tokenized in transit.

external_systems.description: External systems referenced by contexts or relationships. Security Lead's #1 attack surface.

category.description: External system relationship category. Drives vendor risk assessment.

trust_level.description: Trust level assigned to this external system. Affects STRIDE-per-element applicability.

data_classification.description: Highest data classification exchanged with this system.

authn_mechanism.description: Authentication mechanism used when communicating with this external system.

tls_required.description: Whether TLS is required for communication with this external system.

sla_tier.description: Service level agreement tier. Drives availability impact analysis.

vendor_security_assessed.description: Whether a vendor security assessment has been conducted.

vendor_security_assessment_date.description: Date of last vendor security assessment. Stale assessments trigger re-review.

data_residency.description: Geographic region where this external system processes/stores data (e.g., US, EU, APAC).

data_entities.description: Data entities referenced in component relationships. Regulatory annotations enable automated compliance rules.

contains_pii.description: Contains Personally Identifiable Information. Triggers GDPR Art 32 controls.

contains_phi.description: Contains Protected Health Information. Triggers HIPAA §164.312 controls.

contains_pci.description: Contains Payment Card Industry data (cardholder data, PANs). Triggers PCI-DSS Req 3/4.

data_subject_type.description: Type of data subjects. Drives DSAR scope and breach notification requirements.

retention_days.description: Data retention period in days. 0=indefinite. Enables data lifecycle compliance checks.

residency_requirements.description: Geographic regions where this data must reside (e.g., ['EU', 'US']). Drives GDPR Art 44 checks.

masking_required.description: Whether this data requires masking/tokenization when displayed or logged.

origin.description: Data origin. user_input data requires stricter input validation.

volume.description: Data volume indicator. High-volume data exfiltration has greater blast radius.

trust_boundaries.description: Trust boundaries between network zones. Enriched with enforcement details for STRIDE-per-interaction analysis.

boundary_type.description: Type of trust boundary. Jurisdiction boundaries trigger data residency rules.

enforcement_mechanism.description: How the boundary is enforced. none=logical-only boundary, higher risk.

inspection_enabled.description: Whether deep packet inspection or content inspection occurs at this boundary.

bidirectional.description: Whether enforcement applies in both directions. Unidirectional boundaries may allow lateral movement.

accepted_risks.description: Risks reviewed and accepted by stakeholders.

finding_pattern.description: Rule ID or finding category to suppress.

entity_id.description: Specific entity this acceptance applies to.

compensating_controls.description: Description of compensating controls that mitigate this accepted risk.

risk_score.description: Risk score at time of acceptance (likelihood × impact). Enables trend tracking.
